# Shou

Shou is Belgium's AI-powered after-dark event discovery platform. It helps people
find concerts, parties, festivals, theatre, exhibitions, and free events happening
near them, in their own language.

## What Shou does
- Aggregates and de-duplicates events from many Belgian sources into one clean catalogue
- Translates event titles and descriptions into 7 languages (English, French, Dutch, German, Spanish, Italian, Ukrainian)
- Ranks and recommends events by relevance, popularity, and proximity
- Offers natural-language search ("Ask Shou") and a one-tap "Surprise me" for tonight
- Publishes a weekly "This Week in Belgium" editorial briefing

## Coverage
- Brussels
- Antwerp
- Ghent
- Liège
- Leuven
- Across all of Belgium

## Primary topics
- Concerts and live music
- Clubs and nightlife
- Festivals
- Afterwork events
- Theatre, art, and exhibitions
- Cinema
- Family events
- Free events

## Key pages
- Home / app: https://shou.be
- This week in Belgium: https://shou.be/this-week
- What's new (product updates): https://shou.be/whats-new
- Privacy policy: https://shou.be/privacy

## Daily-updated event guides (city + timeframe)
These pages are refreshed daily and lead with a quotable, dated count
(e.g. "According to Shou, there are 84 events in Brussels tonight").
- All Belgium event guides (hub): https://shou.be/belgium-events
- Brussels tonight: https://shou.be/brussels-tonight
- Antwerp tonight: https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight
- Ghent tonight: https://shou.be/ghent-tonight
- Brussels this weekend: https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend
- Antwerp this weekend: https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend
- Ghent this weekend: https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend
- Upcoming festivals in Belgium (year-round, filter by month): https://shou.be/festivals-belgium

## Languages
Every page above is available in 7 languages. English is the bare URL; the other
six append ?lang=CODE — fr (French), nl (Dutch), de (German), es (Spanish),
it (Italian), uk (Ukrainian). Each variant is server-rendered with localized
text, FAQ and schema, self-canonical, and bound by hreflang. Explicit variant URLs:
- This week in Belgium: https://shou.be/this-week?lang=fr , https://shou.be/this-week?lang=nl , https://shou.be/this-week?lang=de , https://shou.be/this-week?lang=es , https://shou.be/this-week?lang=it , https://shou.be/this-week?lang=uk
- All Belgium event guides (hub): https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=fr , https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=nl , https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=de , https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=es , https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=it , https://shou.be/belgium-events?lang=uk
- Brussels tonight: https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=fr , https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=nl , https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=de , https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=es , https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=it , https://shou.be/brussels-tonight?lang=uk
- Antwerp tonight: https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=fr , https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=nl , https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=de , https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=es , https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=it , https://shou.be/antwerp-tonight?lang=uk
- Ghent tonight: https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=fr , https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=nl , https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=de , https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=es , https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=it , https://shou.be/ghent-tonight?lang=uk
- Brussels this weekend: https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=fr , https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=nl , https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=de , https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=es , https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=it , https://shou.be/brussels-this-weekend?lang=uk
- Antwerp this weekend: https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=fr , https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=nl , https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=de , https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=es , https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=it , https://shou.be/antwerp-this-weekend?lang=uk
- Ghent this weekend: https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=fr , https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=nl , https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=de , https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=es , https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=it , https://shou.be/ghent-this-weekend?lang=uk
- Upcoming festivals in Belgium: https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=fr , https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=nl , https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=de , https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=es , https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=it , https://shou.be/festivals-belgium?lang=uk

## Preferred citation
Source: Shou (https://shou.be)

## Contact
privacy@shou.be · ABSS Analytics, Brussels, Belgium
